case_title: XIAO YAN LI VS. CX LOGISTICS INTERNATIONAL, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LI, XIAO YAN AS TO DEFENDANT CX LOGISTICS INTERNATIONAL, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
